description: VERIFIED LIVE: NetEase Cloud Music via your logged-in session (session bridge — no token). A broad read surface over the legacy /api/ paths (no weapi encryption): your account, any user's detail / playlists / listen-record / follows / cloud-disk, plus playlist, artist, album and song detail. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in session; every endpoint below returned 200.

tools.name: netease_account
tools.description: Your NetEase Music account (id, userName). Use the id as uid for user tools. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_user_detail
tools.description: A user's profile detail by uid (level, listenSongs, nickname). VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_user_playlists
tools.description: A user's playlists (created + favorited) by uid. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_user_follows
tools.description: Who a user follows, by uid. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_play_record
tools.description: A user's listening record by uid. type 1 = last week, 0 = all time. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_playlist_detail
tools.description: A playlist's detail and track ids by playlist id. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_song_detail
tools.description: Song detail for one or more ids, e.g. [5267060]. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_artist
tools.description: An artist's profile + hot songs by artist id. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_album
tools.description: An album's detail + tracklist by album id. VERIFIED.
